Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Naberius Clayborn]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius Clayborn is a Guild Chronicler and former keeper of the Imperial Palace treasury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius is the Chronicler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius was the Chronicler in charge of financial records in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius is a Chronicler in red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius is of half-heritage, with a father from Erin and a mother who was an Imperial clerk from Vandenyas.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius is a treasurer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius is a character who carries pistols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius is referred to as the Witness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Naberius is a person who was offered a pistol to kill a crew member for relaxation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Naberius said it would be okay to spend the night in the bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Naberius has dark hair and a blindingly white grin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Naberius is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Naberius's surname is Clayborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Naberius is a character who possesses a map and a compass.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Calder relies on Naberius for navigation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Naberius is a character who anchored outside the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Naberius wishes for Alsa to inspect a candidate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Naberius is a character who shows awe toward the heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Naberius is referred to as Witness Clayborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Naberius is a character being protected by Tristania.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — The Silent One was knocked over Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Naberius is a character who appeared desperate and was searching for the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Naberius has a wound on his calf wrapped with a white bandage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Naberius wears a blue suit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Naberius possesses a Dalton Foster original pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius Clayborn shot Tristania in the back of the head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius Clayborn wears a red suit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius is a Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius is a Witness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius is being considered to bond the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Naberius is a Reader and has friends in every Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Naberius is a person whose presence on the ship is required for departure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Lord Clayborn is a person to whom problems with the Imperial Guard should be taken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Naberius is a candidate for the throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Naberius Clayborn is predicted to be the next Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Lord Clayborn is expected to come aboard The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Naberius is known as The Eternal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Naberius is a target for hostage negotiation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Naberius was gagged and tied to the mast during travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Naberius has sensed the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Naberius is a guest onboard Calder's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Naberius was tied and gagged during a meeting with Kerian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Consultants are taking Naberius Clayborn into their custody.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Naberius ran away after the Consultants were ordered to kneel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Naberius was able to use his Intent to break ropes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Naberius once held the position of Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Naberius followed the whispered song of the Heart to an abandoned meadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Naberius runs through the island clutching a gray-green heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Naberius Clayborn uses his Intent on the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Naberius Clayborn is seen laughing and dancing with the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Naberius is being carried by Andel and Foster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder had an assignment for Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Naberius Clayborn is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Naberius Clayborn's mind was eroded by the Heart of Nakothi.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — A Witness is a type of person that requires a team to kill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Naberius Clayborn has hired a Navigator to sail him and his partner to Nakothi’s island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Naberius Clayborn has a hired Navigator crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Naberius Clayborn is a tall man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Naberius is a person who might want to steal the Heart of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Naberius is working to cut the Heart free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Naberius is cradling the Heart in his arms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Naberius Clayborn is covetous of the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Naberius Clayborn is on Calder Marten's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Naberius Clayborn can bond with the Heart of Nakothi for immortality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Naberius Clayborn is mentioned in relation to the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Naberius Clayborn was recovered by Navigator Captain Calder Marten.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Naberius has wax-sealed memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Witness in charge of Imperial finance is associated with candles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Naberius is a person who would not have accepted the title of Emperor.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The peace accords were penned by the hand of a Witness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Witnesses come in pairs consisting of a Silent One and a Chronicler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Shera failed to kill Naberius Clayborn.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The Witness report included Estyr accusing Calder of being enthralled.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
